meta.tagline: A minimal, fully tested room booking platform built with TypeScript, Express, Prisma, and Cypress.

overview.heading: What is the Booking System?
overview.intro: This project is a modular booking platform designed as a general-purpose system for reservable resources such as conference rooms, laundry facilities, or small-scale hotel rooms.
overview.body: The focus of the project is not visual design but architecture, validation, and test reliability. The system separates a TypeScript-based client from an Express API server, enforces authentication and rate limiting, integrates reCAPTCHA, and maintains booking lifecycle integrity through automated archiving logic and end-to-end test coverage.

systems.title: TypeScript Client
systems.summary: Vanilla TypeScript SPA with custom routing and modular structure.
systems.detail: The client is bundled with Webpack and structured by feature (booking, user, router, components). It communicates with the API via Axios, enforces input validation, integrates reCAPTCHA v2, and maintains a clean separation between UI logic and API utilities.

systems.title: Express API
systems.summary: REST API with JWT auth, rate limiting, and secure middleware.
systems.detail: The Node.js/Express server exposes authentication, booking, room, and user endpoints. It uses JWT for session handling, bcrypt for password hashing, middleware-based route protection, rate limiting, and environment-based configuration for secure deployment.

systems.title: Prisma & Database
systems.summary: Schema-driven data modeling with migrations and client generation.
systems.detail: Prisma manages the booking, user, and room models with migrations and generated clients. The setup ensures consistent schema evolution, seed support, and strong typing between server logic and database access.

systems.title: Cypress E2E Testing
systems.summary: Full end-to-end test coverage of critical user flows.
systems.detail: Cypress tests cover registration, login validation, booking creation, editing, deletion, and booking visibility. Invalid flows are explicitly tested to ensure validation, error handling, and business rules behave predictably.

cards.back: Custom SPA architecture with modular routing, Webpack bundling, and Axios-based API abstraction.
RESTful API with structured controllers, middleware, JWT authentication, rate limiting, and reCAPTCHA verification.
Schema-based modeling, migrations, seed scripts, and generated client for type-safe database operations.
Comprehensive E2E testing suite validating authentication, booking lifecycle, error states, and protected routes.

challenges.heading: Key Technical Challenges
challenges.intro: Building reliability and correctness into a seemingly simple booking flow required careful system design.
challenges.description: Security, state integrity, and test determinism were core priorities.

items.title: Authentication & Session Security
items.summary: Secure login and protected routes with JWT and middleware.
items.detail: Implemented JWT-based authentication with bcrypt password hashing, cookie/session handling, protected routes, and rate limiting to prevent abuse.

items.title: Booking Lifecycle Integrity
items.summary: Separating active and archived bookings automatically.
items.detail: Designed logic to distinguish upcoming bookings from past bookings and archive them automatically once their date passes, ensuring accurate user views.

items.title: End-to-End Test Reliability
items.summary: Deterministic Cypress tests across auth and booking flows.
items.detail: Created comprehensive Cypress suites for valid and invalid flows, including registration errors, booking validation, editing, deletion, and protected access.

items.title: Environment & Security Integration
items.detail: Configured secure environment variables for both client and server, integrated Google reCAPTCHA v2 validation, and ensured safe production configuration.

role.heading: Role
role.intro: This project was built as a full-stack system with a focus on code quality and testing discipline.
role.title: Full-Stack Developer
role.body: I designed and implemented both the client and server architecture, structured the database schema with Prisma, implemented secure authentication, and built the entire end-to-end testing suite with Cypress.
lines: Implemented JWT authentication and security middleware
Designed Prisma schema and migration workflow
Built and maintained Cypress E2E test suite
Configured production deployment with environment isolation

deployment.heading: Deployment
deployment.intro: The system is structured for local development, testing, and production deployment.

items.label: Frontend
items.detail: Webpack-built client deployed to Vercel with environment-based configuration.

items.label: Backend
items.detail: Express API with Prisma ORM, environment variables, and optional production hosting support.
